sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2022-01-01', DATE '2022-12-31');
SELECT id, datesub('month', start_date, end_date) AS month_diff FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_dates SET end_date = DATE '2023-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datesub('month', start_date, end_date) AS month_diff FROM test_dates WHERE start_date < end_date;
